meta.title: Chips Ahoy | Ambassadors
meta.description: Chips Ahoy was bred as a feeder rat for snakes, but she will now live out her full life at Alveus. Chips passed away peacefully in December 2024 from old age.

data.name: Chips Ahoy
data.story:
Chips Ahoy was bred as a feeder rat for snakes, but she will now live out her full life at Alveus.

Chips passed away peacefully in December 2024 from old age.
data.mission: She is an ambassador for how rodenticide use and outdoor cats affect all levels of wildlife.
